---
title: "Alexander Meehan"
---
---
title: "Alexander Meehan"
---

# Hi, I'm Alexander 👋

I'm an MSc Business Analytics candidate at Dublin City University with a 
background in Economics and Politics. I'm interested in using data to solve 
real business problems — from forecasting demand to building dashboards that 
make complex information easy to act on.

This portfolio showcases my projects, skills and experience as I complete my 
masters and move into the world of data and business analytics.

I'm available for opportunities from **May 2026**.

💼 [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/alexander-meehan-267875208)

---

[About Me](about.qmd) · [Projects](projects.qmd) · [CV](cv.qmd)
